Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In cases 102 104 105 the resolution happens the next morning after investigation started in the afternoon This pattern strongly suggests a working hours business calendar effect

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So investigations started late in the day spill over to the next business day adding about 19 hours of mostly non working elapsed time

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: L2 queue delays The escalation handoff introduces significant waiting 2 5h in 102 and 28h in 105 This is the single biggest delay chunk in the log

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Triage and assignment are relatively fast and consistent not bottlenecks

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Fast cases share quick assignment to investigation no escalation investigation and resolution completed before midday

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Escalation is strongly correlated with long cycle times but not the only cause 104 is slow without escalation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The dominant delay contributors are L2 queue waiting after escalation waiting before first investigation and the Investigate Resolve step taking about 19h in all slow cases

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In case 105 there are two Investigate Issue events one by L1 before escalation one by L2 after This rework duplicate activity is characteristic of escalations partial investigation effort duplicated

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mean 20 4h but bimodal distribution fast cluster about 1 to 2 5h and slow cluster about 24 to 49h Using median or cluster based comparison is more meaningful Slow cases are 10 to 35 times longer than fast ones

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Recommendations Increase L2 capacity or create escalation fast lane SLA for L2 pickup Improve L1 triage quality to route tickets correctly first time Address L1 queue delays balance workload add agents during morning peak Investigate the 19h investigate resolve pattern Monitor handoff delays specifically Set SLAs per transition not just overall
